h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.recoheredEarlier: "I thought the exact line would do the caption’s work because the words are identical both times."
scored.statedInsightEvidence: "Oh, I get it — the line is like a label moved onto the wrong object in the case; same ink, different power around it."
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner would attempt to find a verb capturing the shift from ruling to protest.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: No pressure for reversal, dialogue progresses smoothly.
scored.tutorAdaptationEvidence: "“Turned back” is worth testing, not dropping. Put a pencil under three bits of evidence in the second excerpt: who has the floor, who the line is aimed at now, and what the room does after it."
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: T2 directly adapts to L2's proposal and concern, turning it into an evidence-based test.
